title: hypochaeris taraxacoides
intro: Hypochaeris taraxacoides, also known as the false dandelion or smooth cat's ear, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Hypochaeris taraxacoides include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting kidney function. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often in combination with other herbs, to leverage its medicinal properties.
